SELECT timestamp_add(event_time, INTERVAL 1 SECOND) FROM test_dates;
SELECT timestamp_add(event_time, INTERVAL 5 MINUTE) FROM test_dates;
SELECT timestamp_add(event_time, INTERVAL 2 HOUR) FROM test_dates;
SELECT timestamp_add(event_time, INTERVAL 10 DAY) FROM test_dates;
SELECT timestamp_add(event_time, INTERVAL 6 WEEK) FROM test_dates;
SELECT timestamp_add(event_time, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) FROM test_dates;
SELECT timestamp_add(event_time, INTERVAL 1 QUARTER) FROM test_dates;
SELECT timestamp_add(event_time, INTERVAL 1 YEAR) FROM test_dates;
SELECT timestamp_add(d.date_value, INTERVAL 7 DAY) AS new_date FROM test_dates_outer d JOIN test_dates t ON d.date_value < t.event_time;
SELECT timestamp_add(toDate('2023-01-01'), INTERVAL 15 MONTH) AS future_date;
WITH (SELECT timestamp_add(toDate('2000-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR)) AS calculated_date SELECT calculated_date;
SELECT timestamp_add(toDateTime('2023-01-01 00:00:00'), INTERVAL -1 DAY) AS previous_day;
SELECT timestamp_add(toDate('2023-02-28'), INTERVAL 1 DAY) AS next_day_february;
SELECT timestamp_add(toDate('2023-02-28'), INTERVAL 10 MONTH) AS next_year_february;
